mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (seller_id, category_id, title, description, price, condition_level, status) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{conditionLevel}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, u.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.seller_id = u.user_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, (SELECT pi.url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY pi.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS cover FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE product SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId}
